name: HIPAA Baseline — PHI Protection
description: Baseline governance policies for HIPAA compliance. Protects Protected Health Information (PHI) in AI interactions per the HIPAA Privacy Rule (45 CFR 164.502) and Security Rule.

policies.description: Blocks requests where PII is detected in the prompt, preventing PHI from being sent to external AI models. Implements the HIPAA minimum necessary standard (45 CFR 164.502(b)).
Blocks model responses containing PII to prevent PHI disclosure to users who may lack authorization. Supports HIPAA Privacy Rule access controls.

policies.policy_name: HIPAA: Block PHI in RAG Context
policies.description: Blocks RAG-injected context containing PII, preventing inadvertent PHI injection into AI prompts via retrieval pipelines.

policies.policy_name: HIPAA: Attested Model Required for PHI Processing
policies.description: Blocks requests to unattested models when handling potentially sensitive health data. Ensures only approved, audited models process health information.
Always-pass sentinel policy ensuring every AI interaction is audit-logged for HIPAA audit controls (45 CFR 164.312(b)). Confirms audit trail coverage.
Blocks toxic model output that could constitute inappropriate medical guidance or patient harm. Supports HIPAA obligations around care quality in AI-assisted clinical settings.
